interrupt_cause.description: Interrupt cause: a number or a symbolic name (matched case-insensitively).

^enable_z(ba|bb|bc|bs|fh|fhmin|knd|kne|k.description: Deprecated: add the extension to the isa tag instead. Value is ignored.

abi_names.description: Use ABI register names (e.g. sp instead of x2).

num_sources.description: Number of interrupt sources coming into the ACLIC.

has_supervisor_domain.description: Inferred from Ssidctrl being in the isa tag; a conflicting value here elicits a warning.

ipriolen.description: Number of bits used for interrupt priority.

base.description: Base address of the ACLINT memory region (multiple of 8).

size.description: Size of the ACLINT memory region.

sw_offset.description: Offset of the MSWI (software interrupt) device. Presence enables MSWI.

timer_offset.description: Offset of the MTIMECMP registers. Presence enables MTIMER and requires time_offset.

time_offset.description: Offset of the MTIME register. Required when timer_offset is present.

software_interrupt_on_reset.description: Post a software interrupt on reset. Requires the MSWI device (sw_offset).

deliver_interrupts.description: When true (default), the ACLINT devices deliver interrupts to the harts.

timecmp_reset.description: Reset value of the MTIMECMP registers.

address_triggers_report_ea.description: When true, address triggers report the effective address in TVAL.

align_cbo_address.description: When true, align the address reported by cache block operations.

all_inst_addr_trigger.description: When true, instruction address triggers match all addresses of an instruction.

all_ld_st_addr_trigger.description: When true, load/store address triggers match all addresses of a data access.

auto_increment_timer.description: When true, the TIME CSR is automatically incremented.

cancel_lr_on_debug.description: Cancel load-reserve reservation when entering debug mode.

can_receive_interrupts.description: When false, the hart does not receive interrupts.

clear_mtval_on_ebreak.description: When true, EBREAK clears MTVAL instead of setting it to the PC.

clear_tdata1_when_disabled.description: When true, writing a disabled trigger type to TDATA1 clears the register.

clear_tinst_on_cbo_flush.description: When true, MTINST/HTINST are cleared on a cbo.flush trap.

clear_tinst_on_cbo_inval.description: When true, MTINST/HTINST are cleared on a cbo.inval trap.

coherent_icache.description: When true, the instruction cache is coherent with data stores.

core_hart_id_offset.description: Offset between the hart ids of consecutive cores.

is_debug.description: CSR is only accessible in debug mode.

is_h_extension.description: CSR belongs to the hypervisor extension.

privilege_mode.description: Privilege mode of a custom CSR.

disabled_trigger_read_mask.description: Mask applied when reading TDATA1 of a disabled trigger.

enable_mcm_cache.description: Enable the cache model of the memory consistency checker.

enable_mtip.description: When true, the timer interrupt pending bit is controlled by the timer.

enable_pmp_na4.description: Enable the NA4 physical memory protection mode.

enable_pmp_tor.description: Enable the TOR physical memory protection mode.

enable_ppo.description: Preserved program order rules of the memory consistency checker: true/false to enable/disable all rules, or an array of rule numbers to enable.

enable_smstateen.description: Deprecated: use smstateen with the isa tag instead.

enable_translation_napot.description: Deprecated: use svnapot with the isa tag instead.

enable_svinval.description: Deprecated: use svinval with the isa tag instead.

enable_supervisor_time_compare.description: Deprecated: use sstc with the isa tag instead.

enable_counter_overflow.description: Deprecated: use sscofpmf with the isa tag instead.

enable_performance_counters.description: Deprecated: use zicntr with the isa tag instead.

enable_triggers.description: Deprecated: use sdtrig with the isa tag instead.

enable_aia.description: Deprecated: use smaia with the isa tag instead.

frame_buffer.description: Remote frame buffer device. Only available when Whisper is built with REMOTE_FRAME_BUFFER=1.

type.description: Type of the frame buffer device.

base.description: Base address of the frame buffer memory.

port.description: TCP port of the VNC server (default 5998).

hfence_gvma_ignores_gpa.description: When true, hfence.gvma ignores the guest physical address.

indexed_nmi.description: When true, the PC after an NMI is nmi_vec + cause*4 and the PC after an exception in the NMI handler is nmi_exception_vec + cause*4.

in_sequence_misaligned.description: When true, misaligned accesses are performed byte by byte.

base.description: Base address of the IOMMU memory region.

size.description: Size of the IOMMU memory region.

capabilities.description: Value of the IOMMU capabilities register.

fctl.description: Value of the IOMMU features control register.

auto_process_commands.description: Automatically process the IOMMU command queue.

ddtp_1lvl_legal.description: One-level device directory table is legal.

ddtp_2lvl_legal.description: Two-level device directory table is legal.

ddtp_3lvl_legal.description: Three-level device directory table is legal.

ddt_cache_size.description: Size of the device directory table cache.

pdt_cache_size.description: Size of the process directory table cache.

num_hpm.description: Number of hardware performance monitor counters.

hpm_width.description: Width of the hardware performance monitor counters.

aplic_source.description: APLIC source used for wire-signaled interrupts. Required unless capabilities.IGS is MSI.

keep_reservation_on_sc_exception.description: Keep load-reserve reservation on exceptions in sc.w/sc.d.

machine_interrupts.description: Machine level interrupts in order of decreasing priority.

mark_dirty_gstage_for_vs_nonleaf_pte.description: Speculatively set the dirty bit in G-stage PTEs on implicit accesses for VS-stage page table walks.

consoleio.description: Address of the console I/O device: a byte stored to this address is written to the console.

register_size.description: Size in bytes of the memory mapped registers (4 or 8, default 4).

nmi_exception_vec.description: PC after an exception while in the non-maskable-interrupt handler.

non_maskable_interrupts.description: Non-maskable interrupt causes in order of decreasing priority.

page_fault_on_first_access.description: Deprecated: feature is now controlled by bit 61 of the MENVCFG/HENVCFG CSR.

perf_count_fp_load_store_as_fp.description: Count floating point load/store instructions as floating point instructions.

perf_count_vec_load_store_as_vec.description: Count vector load/store instructions as vector instructions.

zero_mask.description: Mask of address bits that must be zero.

secure_mask.description: Mask of address bits that select the secure world.

trap_insecure_read.description: When true, insecure reads of secure memory trigger an exception.

secure_region.description: Page-aligned low and high bounds of the secure region.

supervisor_interrupts.description: Supervisor level interrupts in order of decreasing priority.

time_down_sample.description: Down-sample factor applied to the timer.

trace_pma.description: Trace physical memory attribute checks in log.

trace_ptw.description: Trace page table walk in log.

trap_non_zero_vstart.description: Deprecated at top level: use trap_non_zero_vstart in the vector section.

trigger_actions.description: Supported trigger actions. Must include raisebreak.

trigger_clear_unsupported_action.description: When true, writing an unsupported action to TDATA1 clears the action field.

trigger_napot_maskmax.description: Maximum number of address bits that can be masked by a NAPOT trigger.

trigger_on_all_data_addr.description: Array of [match-type, flag] pairs: for the given trigger match type, the flag indicates whether matching applies to all addresses of a data access.

trigger_on_all_instr_addr.description: Array of [match-type, flag] pairs: for the given trigger match type, the flag indicates whether matching applies to all addresses of an instruction.

trigger_types.description: Supported trigger types. Must include none and disabled.

trigger_use_tcontrol.description: Use the TCONTROL CSR to control triggers in machine mode.

iid.description: Interrupt id of the UART (uart8250 only).

channel.description: Channel of the UART (uart8250 only): stdio, pty, unix:<server socket path>, or a semicolon separated list of those.

reg_shift.description: Log2 of the register spacing in bytes (uart8250 only, default 2).

trap_non_zero_vstart.description: Arithmetic vector instructions will trap on no-zero vstart whent this is true.

mask_agnostic_policy.description: Masked off vector elements will be filled with binary all-ones or left undisturbed.

tail_agnostic_policy.description: Tail vector elements will be filled with binary all-ones or left undisturbed.

trap_out_of_bounds_vstart.description: Vector instructions will trap on vstart values larger than vl.

trap_invalid_vtype.description: Trap on invalid vtype in vsetvl/vsetvli/vsetivli instead of setting the vill bit.

update_whole_mask.description: Mask producing instructions update the whole destination register.

tt_fp_usum_tree_reduction.description: Element widths for which vfredusum uses tree reduction.

fp_usum_nan_canonicalize.description: Element widths for which vfredusum canonicalizes NaN results.

legalize_vsetvl_avl.description: Legalize the application vector length of vsetvl.

legalize_vsetvli_avl.description: Legalize the application vector length of vsetvli.

legalize_for_egs.description: Legalize vl to a multiple of the element group size of vector crypto instructions.

partial_segment_update.description: Partially update segment on a trapping segmented load/store.

always_mark_dirty.description: Vector instructions always mark VS as dirty in MSTATUS.

vmvr_ignore_vill.description: Whole vector register move instructions ignore the vill bit.

tt_clear_tval_vl_egs.description: Clear MTVAL on traps caused by vl not being a multiple of the element group size.

ids.description: number of interrupt identifiers per file (must be a multiple of 64): a single value for all privileges or an array of 3 values for M, S, and VS

eithreshold_mask.description: mask defining the valid bits of the eithreshold register

trace.description: trace imsic accesses in the log

num_sources.description: number of interrupt sources coming into the APLIC

domains.description: collection of domains in the APLIC

parent.description: name of parent domain or null if root domain

is_machine.description: machine privilege domain when true; otherwise, supervisor

base.description: base address of domain memory region

hart_indices.description: harts belonging to the domain, this is relevant for direct delivery

child_index.description: order of a domain within its parent, not needed if a domain has no sibling, if a domain A, has two sub-domains B and C, then B and C should be assigned a child_index each from indices 0 and 1 according to their order.

xlen.description: Deprecated: xlen is obtained from the isa tag.
